notes: Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around washing with water and often soap. Kept separate from putzen = everyday cleaning of rooms or surfaces and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning.

de.definition: Mit Wasser und oft Seife Schmutz vom Körper, von den Händen, Haaren oder Kleidern entfernen.
de.usage_note: Typisch für Körper, Hände, Haare, Kleidung oder Stoffe; nicht das normale Alltagsverb für Zimmer, Böden oder Fenster.
examples: Vor dem Essen gehen die Kinder noch einmal ins Bad und benutzen Wasser und Seife für ihre Hände.

it.definition: Togliere lo sporco dal corpo, dalle mani, dai capelli o dai vestiti usando acqua e spesso sapone.
it.usage_note: Tipico per corpo, mani, capelli, vestiti o tessuti; non è il verbo più normale per stanze, pavimenti o superfici.
examples: Prima di mangiare, i bambini tornano un attimo in bagno e usano acqua e sapone per le mani.

en.definition: To remove dirt from the body, hands, hair, or clothes using water and often soap.
en.usage_note: Typical for the body, hands, hair, clothes, or fabrics; not the usual everyday verb for rooms, floors, or windows.
examples: Before eating, the children go back to the bathroom and use soap and water on their hands.

notes: Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around everyday cleaning of rooms, surfaces, objects, windows, or shoes. Kept separate from waschen = wash with water and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning.

de.definition: Schmutz von Räumen, Flächen, Fenstern, Schuhen oder anderen Dingen entfernen und sie ordentlich machen.
de.usage_note: Alltagsverb für Haushalt und Oberflächen; auch häufig in der Verbindung Zähne putzen.
examples: Am Samstag entfernt er den Staub von allen Flächen in der Küche.

it.definition: Togliere lo sporco da stanze, superfici, finestre, scarpe o altri oggetti e rimetterli in ordine.
it.usage_note: Verbo quotidiano per casa e superfici; in tedesco si usa spesso anche per i denti.
examples: Il sabato toglie la polvere da tutte le superfici della cucina.

en.definition: To remove dirt from rooms, surfaces, windows, shoes, or other objects and make them orderly.
en.usage_note: Everyday verb for household cleaning and surfaces; in German it is also common with teeth.
examples: On Saturday he removes dust from every surface in the kitchen.

notes: Editorial addition from the Italian pulire/lavare ambiguity audit. Modeled around more formal or technical cleaning that removes dirt, residue, or other substances thoroughly. Kept separate from putzen = everyday household cleaning and waschen = washing with water.

de.definition: Etwas gründlich oder fachlich von Schmutz, Rückständen oder anderen Stoffen befreien.
de.usage_note: Formeller und technischer als putzen; häufig bei Filtern, Geräten, Oberflächen oder Materialien.
examples: Vor der nächsten Benutzung muss der Filter sorgfältig von Rückständen befreit werden.

it.definition: Liberare qualcosa in modo accurato o più tecnico da sporco, residui o altre sostanze.
it.usage_note: Più formale o tecnico del normale pulire di casa; utile per filtri, dispositivi, superfici o materiali.
examples: Prima dell'uso successivo, il filtro deve essere liberato con cura dai residui.

en.definition: To remove dirt, residue, or other substances from something in a thorough or more technical way.
en.usage_note: More formal or technical than the everyday household sense; useful for filters, devices, surfaces, or materials.
examples: Before the next use, the filter has to be cleared carefully of residue.

notes: Editorial addition completing the waschen/putzen/reinigen cluster. Modeled around rinsing with water, especially dishes, glasses, or other objects. Kept separate from waschen = wash the body or clothes, putzen = everyday cleaning, and reinigen = more formal or technical cleaning. The toilet-flush sense is intentionally excluded.

de.definition: Mit Wasser Essensreste, Seife oder andere Rückstände von Geschirr, Gläsern oder anderen Dingen entfernen.
de.usage_note: Oft bei Tellern, Tassen, Gläsern oder Haaren; hier nicht im Sinn von eine Toilette spülen.
examples: Nach dem Essen lässt sie warmes Wasser über die Teller laufen, bevor alles in den Schrank kommt.

it.definition: Togliere con l'acqua residui di cibo, sapone o altre sostanze da piatti, bicchieri o altri oggetti.
it.usage_note: Spesso per stoviglie, bicchieri o capelli; qui non nel senso di tirare l'acqua del water.
examples: Dopo cena fa passare acqua calda sui piatti prima di rimetterli via.

en.definition: To remove food, soap, or other residue with water from dishes, glasses, or other objects.
en.usage_note: Often used for dishes, glasses, or hair; not used here in the sense of flushing a toilet.
examples: After dinner, she runs warm water over the plates before putting them away.
